hero.title: Do everything <1>100 times better</1>, with our simple AI-powered tools.
hero.subtitle: A growing collection of tools for students, working professionals, and entrepreneurs to tackle real problems and do everything 100 times better.

products.heading: Our Products
products.subtitle: We do not build apps. We build real products that solve your real problems.

reader.name: Reader
reader.problem: Reading long things is hard. Articles, books, tutorials — you start, your eyes get tired, you hit a word you don't know, you can't fully understand, you forget what you read, and you have no idea how to use it in real life. So you just stop. It's not your fault. It's just how reading works.
reader.solution: Reader solves the reading struggle by breaking long text into short, gentle parts. Tired eyes are calmed by a clean, strain-free layout. Unknown words get instant meaning. Confusing sections become clear through real-world examples and analogies. And simple take-away notes turn reading into real-life action.

features.label: Small, gentle parts
features.text: Long articles, books, documents — broken into bite-sized pieces that feel light and easy.

features.label: Easy on your eyes
features.text: A clean, soft layout with gentle colors that keep your eyes fresh, even after hours.

features.label: Instant word meanings
features.text: Tap any word to see its meaning right away, no leaving the page.

features.label: Help when you're stuck
features.text: Don't understand a section? The AI explains it with real-world examples and simple analogies.

features.label: Remember what you read
features.text: Short quizzes after each part lock the learning in, so it stays with you.

request.title: Request a tool
request.description: Stuck on something no tool seems to solve? Tell me what would make your work easier.

footer.about: do100x builds simple, high-quality, AI-powered tools for students, professionals, and entrepreneurs — each one carefully designed to remove one real problem from your day, so you can spend more time on what actually matters.
